title: Opendoor Technologies Analyst Ratings and Earnings Estimates
text: Opendoor Technologies (OPEN) Analyst Ratings and Earnings Estimates. OPEN carries a Hold rating consensus comprising 2 Buy recommendations, 2 Hold ratings, and 1 Sell rating. The average analyst price target stands at $6, representing approximately 17% upside from current trading levels. Earnings projections: On average, analysts forecast that OPEN's EPS will be -$0.22 for 2026, with the lowest EPS forecast at -$0.27, and the highest EPS forecast at -$0.18. Analyst consensus expects revenue to grow 26% over the next 12 months, an improvement versus the last two years. Looking ahead, analysts expect revenue to grow 26% over the next 12 months. These analyst expectations reflect a view that Opendoor's new Opendoor 2.0 strategy and AI integration will drive operational improvements and help narrow losses over time.
